index.title: MatchPulse Support Centre
index.introHtml:
Everything you need to run a competition on MatchPulse, from setting up your first organisation to finalising a season.

If you're new, start with Getting Started. If you're looking for something specific, jump straight to the section.
index.introPlain: Everything you need to run a competition on MatchPulse, from setting up your first organisation to finalising a season. If you're new, start with **Getting Started**. If you're looking for something specific, jump straight to the section.
